raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2023, I saw a charge in the amount of {$400.00} from AMEX XXXX XXXX XXXX on my billing statement that I did not authorize. After contacting American Express, they failed to provide an explanation for the charge and failed to provide me with a refund. They told me that they had opened a global complaint about it and that I should wait for a response. However, I did not get a response until now. 
The same issue happened again on XX/XX/XXXX and it was for the amount {$41.00}. I contacted American Express again and was on the line for XXXX minuets with no one able to provide an explanation for the charge. When I searched online, it appears that this issue is wide spread and found that I can file a complaint with CFPB to help me with this.
